ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported offense */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the offense occurred */,
  "offense_code" TEXT /* Code for the type of offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the offense */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the offense location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the offense location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the offense occurred */,
  "date_of_offense" TEXT /* Date when the offense took place */,
  "offense_type" TEXT /* Type of offense (e.g., Violent, Non-Violent) */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the offense */,
  "suspected_weapon" TEXT /* Type of weapon suspected in the offense */,
  "number_of_suspects" INTEGER /* Number of suspects involved in the offense */,
  "number_of_victims" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the offense */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenses_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenses_offense_type FOREIGN KEY ("offense_type") REFERENCES offense_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenses_reporting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenses_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the precinct */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the precinct */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain in charge of the precinct */,
  "number_of_officers" INTEGER /* Number of officers assigned to the precinct */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the precinct */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense type (e.g., Violent, Non-Violent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense type (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "punishment_range" TEXT /* Range of possible punishments for the offense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct associated with the statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "violent_offenses" INTEGER /* Count of violent offenses in the year */,
  "non_violent_offenses" INTEGER /* Count of non-violent offenses in the year */,
  "total_offenses" INTEGER /* Total count of offenses in the year */,
  "officer_deployments" INTEGER /* Number of officer deployments in the precinct for the year */,
  "community_engagements" INTEGER /* Number of community engagement activities in the precinct for the year */,
  "arrests_made" INTEGER /* Number of arrests made in the precinct for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated offense */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report creation */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who created the report */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "reporting_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was created */,
  "reporting_location" TEXT /* Location where the report was filed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reporting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criminals" (
  "criminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criminal record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense associated with the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the criminal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the criminal */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the criminal */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of arrest */,
  "arrest_location" TEXT /* Location of arrest */,
  "previous_offenses" TEXT /* Details of any previous offenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criminals_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense associated with the victim */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the victim */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the victim */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Details of any injuries sustained */,
  "medical_treatment" TEXT /* Details of any medical treatment received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of evidence */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the evidence (e.g., collected, analyzed) */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., physical, digital, testimonial) */,
  "evidence_collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who collected the evidence */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the evidence is stored */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was analyzed */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the evidence analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_evidence_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("evidence_collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_prevention_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevention program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the program */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the program */,
  "program_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program leader */,
  "program_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes and effectiveness of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_prevention_programs_program_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the feedback is associated with */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., community member, local business) */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_feedback_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES crime_prevention_programs ("program_id")
)
